intro: Barosma betulina, also known as the "buchu" or "round-leaf barosma," is a plant native to South Africa that has been used for centuries in traditional medicine and as a flavoring agent. The paste has a distinctive aroma and flavor, often used in traditional remedies and as a natural alternative to commercial medications.
